audit_items.proof_trace: The code executes blockhashes (EIP-2935) at line 58 before beacon roots (EIP-4788) at line 59, violating the required order beacon_roots < history_storage. EthBlockExecutor mirrors this incorrect order at lines 106-108.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Blocks processed with this implementation will have system calls in wrong order, causing consensus failures with clients following the correct specification order (beacon roots before history storage).
